title: andropogon giganteus
intro: Andropogon giganteus, also known as Tall Bluestem, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Andropogon giganteus include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and supporting respiratory health. The plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil for its medicinal uses.
